name: automation-email-monorepo
description: Monorepo with a Next.js frontend deployed from the repo root via vercel.json.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf frontend/.next frontend/node_modules/.cache && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
